name: Maine Family
description_short: Maine Family Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union based in Lewiston, Maine, offering savings accounts, loans, mortgages, and credit cards to individuals and families.
description_long:
Maine Family Federal Credit Union (MFFCU) is a federally chartered credit union headquartered in Lewiston, Maine, with at least one additional branch location in Auburn. As a credit union, it operates on a member-owned cooperative model rather than as a for-profit institution. The organization has established itself as a community-focused financial institution serving Maine residents for multiple generations, with customer testimonials indicating 20+ year membership relationships.

MAFFCU offers a comprehensive suite of consumer banking and lending products. These include checking and savings accounts with youth account options, certificates of deposit (currently advertised at up to 3.65% APY), auto loans (advertised from 4.65% APR), home loans and mortgages (20-year first mortgages advertised from 5.933% APR), home equity lines of credit, personal loans, and Visa credit cards. The institution provides online banking access and phone-based customer service at 207-783-2071. Their routing number is 211287913.

The credit union distinguishes itself through member testimonials emphasizing personalized service, knowledgeable staff, and competitive rates. Marketing materials highlight "Love My Credit Union Rewards" program benefits, community commitment initiatives, and youth financial education programs including a $20 youth account bonus. The organization actively promotes low down payment home loan programs and expert guidance from lending staff. Multiple customer reviews specifically praise individual loan officers and branch staff by name, suggesting relationship-based service.

As a credit union serving a regional market, MFFCU's primary limitation is geographic—membership appears restricted to those in Maine or with qualifying affiliations. Interest rates advertised are competitive but not exceptional by current market standards. The institution does not appear to specialize in credit repair, debt relief, or alternative lending products. Customers seeking niche services like secured credit building products or rapid emergency cash may need to evaluate other options.
services: Checking and savings accounts with no membership fees
Youth savings accounts with financial education and promotional bonuses
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with rates up to 3.65% APY
Auto loans for new, used, and refinanced vehicles starting at 4.65% APR
Home purchase mortgages with competitive rates and low down payment programs
Home equity lines of credit for leveraging home equity
Visa credit cards with unspecified rewards structure
Online banking with login enrollment available
Phone-based customer service and lending support
Love My Credit Union Rewards program for member discounts
pros: Member-owned credit union structure typically results in lower fees and rates aligned with member benefit rather than shareholder profit
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.65% APR with flexible financing for new, used, and refinanced vehicles
Youth accounts with financial education and $20 bonus incentive in April, supporting long-term money habit development
Home loan programs featuring competitive rates (5.933% on 20-year mortgages), low down payment options, and competitive closing costs
Multi-generational customer retention evidenced by testimonials spanning 20+ years, indicating stable service and member satisfaction
Personalized lending support with named loan officers (Danielle, Sue M.) receiving specific customer praise for responsiveness
High-yield CD rates up to 3.65% APY and rewards program through Love My Credit Union partnership
cons: Geographic limitation to Maine membership restricts access for out-of-state consumers
Limited online presence and digital product information compared to larger national banks or fintech competitors
No evidence of specialized credit-building products (secured cards, credit builder loans) for consumers rebuilding credit
Mortgage rates at 5.933% for 20-year terms are not notably lower than national competitors as of current market conditions
No mention of emergency/rapid cash lending products or same-day funding options for urgent financial needs
best_for: Maine residents seeking relationship-based banking with personalized service and multi-generational institutional knowledge
Auto buyers and refinancers in Maine looking for competitive rates without national bank overhead
Families establishing youth savings accounts and teaching children financial literacy with structured programs
Homebuyers in Maine seeking competitive mortgages with low down payment programs and expert guidance
diagnosis: Maine Family FCU is best for Maine-based consumers seeking traditional, relationship-driven credit union banking with competitive consumer loan rates and personalized service. The primary caveat is geographic restriction to Maine—out-of-state consumers cannot join, and rates, while competitive, are not exceptionally advantageous compared to national competitors in current market conditions.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Maine Family — Credit Union in Lewiston, ME | CreditDoc
meta_description: Maine Family — NCUA-insured credit union in Lewiston, ME. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
